reviews.comment:
Excelente en todo , hasta en espacio desde estacionamiento hasta el servicompras, mesas exteriores, bien ubicada en bajada Unicenter mano a provincia, baños excelentes,  excelente atención y rapidez,  cuenta con local de canje de puntos,  atención exclusiva..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent in every way, from the parking lot to the convenience store, outdoor tables, well located on the Unicenter downhill towards the province, excellent bathrooms, excellent and fast service, it has a points redemption location, exclusive service.
